revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-2-040

Continuous carrier radio beacon

A radio beacon, the carrier of which is unbroken but which is modulated with the identification signal.


Note: The continuous carrier improves the performance of automatic direction finders.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Radio beacon - Continuous carrier}}
